title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 233.060 - Compensation of board
text:
233.060.  Compensation of board. — Said board shall serve without compensation, but actual, necessary expenses, actually paid, shall be repaid to them.
(RSMo 1939 § 8680) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 8031; 1919 § 10807; 1909 § 10583
